because.text: Second mechanization front closed (first: SizeBound 6b715124). The s6.2 cascade and the s5.1 Resonance Identity - both stated as theorems in prose since v0.5 - are now checked theorems; the ADR-006 fold killer is a machine-checked witness on the FV-FOLD-UNSOUND operands. LUT imported as generated data inheriting the s4 arbiter fail-fast; bridge: byte-exact regen + no-sorry guard (lean exits 0 on sorry - the guard does not) + 582-case executed-Lean-vs-oracle differential, ALL AGREE. TCB honesty on the record: LUT-dependent facts ride native_decide (compiler trusted for those); the symbolic theorems do not. Proof grind by a delegated subagent over SSH-lean; maintainer cold-ran the full bridge on a fresh master checkout before filing. Remaining unmechanized (README): byte-level machine correspondence.

subject.note: Executable law: Book II wave algebra machine-checked (Lean 4) - range closure, zero-amp cascade, Left Dominance, crystallization, fold non-associativity
